Alter table [dbo].[__CTS_InsideSalesWerksterminUpdates] ADD ReasonQuality bit;
 
Alter table [dbo].[__CTS_InsideSalesWerksterminUpdates] Add ReasonQualityComments nvarchar(1000);
 
Alter table [dbo].[__CTS_InsideSalesWerksterminUpdates] ADD ReasonStatusP bit;
 
Alter table [dbo].[__CTS_InsideSalesWerksterminUpdates] Add ReasonStatusPComments nvarchar(1000);

ALTER TABLE [dbo].[__CTS_AccessProfile] ADD [InsideSalesChecks] BIT, [InsideSalesChecksArchive] BIT;
 
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[__CTS_AccessProfile] ADD [InsideSalesCustomerSummary] BIT ;

ALTER TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_AccessProfile] ADD [AddRohArtikelNummer] BIT, [EditRohArtikelNummer] BIT, [DeleteRohArtikelNummer] BIT ;
 
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_AccessProfile] ADD GetRohArtikelNummer BIT ;
